Introduction
    Anna visits her writer sister Erica and her cop husband Patrik in Fjällbacka. Anna dates a TV host filming in town. A woman's found unconscious, OD'd on insulin. Then a man's murdered. Patrik and Erica investigate.

Also known as: The Fjällbacka Murders: In the Eye of the Beholder
